The '''''Delta''-class shuttle''' was a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] model used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The ''Delta''-class shuttle had stubby wings near the end of the fuselage. The ship had three [[Engine/Legends|engines]]. The main engine was located on top of the [[Hull/Legends|hull]], while the other two engines, used for vertical take-off/landing (VTOL) were located at the bottom, near the cockpit and the wings.<ref name="SW73" />

The shuttle had a crew of at least two, although one person was enough to operate the ship. The ''Delta''-class could carry at least eight passengers, usually [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].<ref name="SW73" /><ref name="GG11">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> The crew and passengers could disembark via a door at the rear of the ship.<ref name="SW73" />

==History==
One such shuttle was used by an Imperial team searching for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy [[Yom Argo]] who crashed on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lahsbane/Legends|Lahsbane]]. The shuttle was later stolen by the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Dani/Legends|Dani]], who made off with a great haul of [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Huhk]] treasure from [[the Forbidden City]].<ref name="SW73" />

Another one of these shuttles was part of an Imperial supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] that was involved in a [[Skirmish near Kaellin III|skirmish]] near [[Kaellin III]] and was forced to crash-land on the planet. The stormtrooper complement fought against the natives before they were rescued by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="GG11" />

In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]] these shuttles were considered old and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had begun the dismantling of several ex-Imperial ''Delta''-class shuttles on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] acquired one of the shuttles non-functioning [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] and gave it as a present to his daughter [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. After Jaina had brought it into a working state, it was later used by marooned Imperial pilot [[Qorl]] to escape the planet in his [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]].<ref name="YJK1">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]''</ref>
